Privacy

Technology infrastructure for businesses

Your technology infrastructure partner.

Opticable supports businesses with the design, installation, and management of technology infrastructure so day-to-day operations stay reliable, secure, and high performing.

Request a quoteView all services
  • Structured cabling and backbone infrastructure for connected environments
  • Professional WiFi built around coverage, performance, and security
  • IT solutions for servers, workstations, and business systems
  • Camera surveillance for buildings, teams, and operations
  • Intercom and access control for secure, well-managed entry points

Project environments

Technology systems that feel structured, modern, and supportable.

Services

Core services

A concept built around five services that define the broader Opticable offer for modern business environments.

Structured Cabling

Structured Cabling

LAN

Cat5e, Cat6, Cat6A, fiber, patch panels, network racks, and certification work for dependable connectivity.

View service page

Professional WiFi

Professional WiFi

WIFI

Coverage planning, access point installation, controller setup, and optimization for offices, retail, warehouses, and multi-unit buildings.

View service page

IT Solutions

IT Solutions

IT

Servers, workstations, network equipment, operational support, and practical IT infrastructure for growing business environments.

View service page

Camera Surveillance

Camera Surveillance

CCTV

Modern surveillance systems designed to protect buildings, teams, and daily operations with reliable monitoring access.

View service page

Access Control

Intercom and Access Control

ENTRY

Audio-video intercoms, card readers, secure door workflows, and integrated entry management for professional properties.

View service page

Why choose Opticable

Why choose Opticable

Opticable helps businesses design, install, and support the technology infrastructure that keeps their operations connected, secure, and efficient.

Technical expertise

We plan infrastructure with a practical understanding of connectivity, security, deployment, and long-term support.

Tailored solutions

Each project is adapted to the site, operational requirements, and growth plans of the client.

Installation quality

Clean execution, organized cabling, and dependable system turnover remain part of the deliverable.

Service and support

We stay focused on clear communication, reliable follow-up, and systems that remain easier to manage after install.

Project process

Project process

A strong technology project starts with the right planning, then moves through clean delivery and practical follow-up.

01

Assessment

We review the site, the current environment, operational constraints, and the systems that need to work together.

02

Design

We define the technical scope, infrastructure approach, device locations, and the right deployment path.

03

Installation

We install, configure, organize, and test the infrastructure with a clean and professional workflow.

04

Support

We help with turnover, optimization, and the next operational steps after implementation.

Industries

Who we support

Business environments that need modern, reliable, and supportable technology infrastructure.

Businesses and offices

Structured cabling, WiFi, IT systems, and secure operations for professional work environments.

Commercial properties

Technology infrastructure that supports occupancy, tenant service, and building performance.

Multi-unit and mixed-use sites

Shared-area connectivity, secure entry, surveillance, and practical operational systems.

Developers, contractors, and managers

Technology planning and delivery that fits project sequencing and building realities.

Project Intake

Need a technology specialist for cameras, secure entry, WiFi, or building communications?

Send a quote request with the property type, required systems, and target timeline.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
